case_title: ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ANDREW CROANBEE et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST RYAN E. VOS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-26-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-10-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA CSR# 11935 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CROANBEE, ANDREW AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-05-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: VOS, RYAN E. SUBSTITUTED FOR SELIKOVITZ, MOSHE AS ATTORNEY FOR ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 CONTINUED TO NOV-04-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION FILED, THE COURT ORDERED CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING NOV-04-2009 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
